name: orchestrator
description: Self-hosted multi-agent Gemini workspace with chat, browser automation, MCP, skills, scheduling, and local persistence.

scripts.kill-ports: sh -c 'for p in 8787 5173; do pids=$(lsof -ti tcp:$p); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "[kill-ports] Releasing port $p (pid: $pids)"; kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.2; kill -9 $pids 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done'
scripts.restart:dev: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); const path = require('node:path'); const root = path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules', 'node-pty', 'prebuilds'); if (fs.existsSync(root)) { for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(root)) { const helperPath = path.join(root, entry, 'spawn-helper'); try { fs.chmodSync(helperPath, 0o755); } catch {} } }"
